set.body: Found while fixing the mlx/metal source-build blocker: devtools::test() on backends/amatrix.mlx with the native backend available shows FAIL 4 / PASS 97, identical on pristine main (verified by stashing the fix) — pre-existing native-path bugs, not caused by the build fix. They skip on machines without MLX so CI/R-universe don't see them. Needs triage on Apple Silicon: test-backend-registration capabilities mismatch, chol-smoke non-conformable, rsvd-smoke.
set.title: 4 pre-existing mlx native-path test failures on main (backend-registration capabilities, chol-smoke non-conformable, rsvd-smoke)
